nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog. Partly cloudy. Low around 58, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. West wind around 7 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.shortForecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3pm and 4pm. Sunny. High near 90, with temperatures falling to around 85 in the afternoon. West wind 6 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 55, with temperatures rising to around 59 overnight. Northeast wind 3 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1pm and 3pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3pm and 4pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 88. South southeast wind 6 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.
